subtasks.description: Query SQL warehouse to get top spending publishers with their total spend and aggregate product category breakdowns (volume/value by product type)

Analyze publisher spend concentration, product mix diversity, and contract terms to assess negotiation leverage (e.g., single-product dependency, spend growth, contract renewal timing, competitive alternatives). Generate leverage scores and recommendations.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks required: (1) sql_gen (mid) to join publisher spend with product category data and aggregate by publisher — mid tier because this likely involves multiple tables with product taxonomy joins and aggregation. (2) cross_recon (mid) to synthesize the spend data with contract terms and market factors to assess leverage posture — mid tier for moderate complexity multi-signal reasoning. No policy_action needed because this is leverage assessment/recommendation, not governance approval. No multitool_plan needed as this is a standard BI workflow.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, product, COUNT(event_id) AS event_count, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS total_active_seats, SUM(amount_usd) AS product_spend, SUM(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY publisher) AS total_publisher_spend, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(amount_usd) / SUM(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY publisher), 2) AS pct_of_publisher_spend, COUNT(DISTINCT product) OVER (PARTITION BY publisher) AS distinct_product_count, COUNT(DISTINCT event_type) AS distinct_event_types FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY publisher, product ORDER BY total_publisher_spend DESC, publisher, product_spend DESC
